    Surface Laptop, 13-inch

    Starting at $1,149.99

    1. Step 1Build
    2. Step 2, not available until the previous steps are completeAdd-ons
    3. Step 3, not available until the previous steps are completeAccessories

    Let’s build your new Surface Laptop

    • The lightest Surface Laptop delivers built-in AI experiences and impressive performance powered by Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core) processors to enhance your productivity and creativity. Enjoy a sleek, ultrathin design available in various colors and finishes, a vibrant 13-inch touchscreen, and all-day battery life.1

      • Surface Laptop, 13-inch
      • USB-C® charging cable
      • Surface 45W USB-C® Wall Charger
      • Quick Start Guide
      • Safety and warranty documents

    • Get Windows 11 Pro when you buy a business device. Shop Surface Laptop for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch | Snapdragon or compare devices.

    • Check out our Certified Refurbished devices—you might score the Surface you need at a great price with an extensive warranty.

    Surface Laptop, 13-inch

    From $1,149.99

    Looking for other display sizes? Shop the 13.8-inch or the 15-inch Surface Laptop.

     

    Why buy from Microsoft: Free shipping, 60-day price protection, and 60-day free returns.

    Microsoft Store Trade-in Program Get up to $800 cash back when you trade in an eligible device.**

    Microsoft Complete

    When life happens, Microsoft Complete has you covered. 

    ✔ Unlimited mechanical breakdown coverage for unexpected hardware failures 

    ✔ Accidental damage* protection from drops and spills

    ✔ Battery wear coverage to protect against natural degradation

    Fast repairs, device replacement if needed, prepaid return shipping, and easy support through your Microsoft Account - simple, stress-free peace of mind.

    Choose a protection plan

    • No thanks

      I don't want any additional protection for my device at this time.

      $129.00

    • Microsoft Complete - 3 year

      $179.00

    • Microsoft Complete - 4 year

      $239.00

    Microsoft 365

    Get 15 months for the price of 12 when you buy Microsoft 365 with this device

    • Includes Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and OneNote desktop apps with Microsoft Copilot
    • Higher usage limits than free for select Copilot features
    • Cloud storage with advanced security
    • For PC, Mac, iOS and Android

    App availability varies by device/language. Features vary by platform. Minimum age limits may apply to use of AI features. Details. 

    Please make a choice

    • One-Time Offer

      Microsoft 365 Family – English (15-Months)

      • For up to 6 people
      • 6 TB of cloud storage (1 TB per person)

      $129.99

    • One-Time Offer

      Microsoft 365 Personal – English (15-Month)

      • For one person
      • 1 TB of cloud storage

      $99.99

    • No thanks

      Note: If you purchase Microsoft 365 later, this offer will not be available.

      Surface Laptop, 13-inch

      Starting at $1,149.99

        Surface Laptop key tech specs

        Surface Laptop, 13-inch

        Device

        Laptop
        Software

        <glyph>windows-logo-inline</glyph>Windows 11 Home
        Battery life

        Up to 23 hours of local video playback1
        Up to 16 hours of active web usage6
        Power supply

        Power supply unit included
        Display size

        13-inch PixelSense™ display5,7
        Ports

        2 X USB-C®/ USB 3.2 ports
        Camera & video

        1080p
        Network

        Wi-Fi 72 
        Weight3

        2.7 lbs (1.22 kg)
        Processor

        Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core)
        Neural processing unit (NPU)

        Qualcomm® Hexagon™ with 45 TOPS
        Graphics

        Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU
        RAM4

        16GB LPDDR5x RAM
        Storage4

        Up to 512GB (UFS)

        Surface Laptop, Copilot+ PC, 13.8-inch

        Device

        Laptop
        Software

        <glyph>windows-logo-inline</glyph>Windows 11 Home
        Battery life

        Up to 20 hours of local video playback5
        Size

        13.8 inch HDR6 touchscreen
        Ports

        2 x USB-C®        

        1 x USB-A
        Camera & video

        1080p
        Network

        Wi-Fi 72
        Weight3

        1.34 kg (2.96 lbs)
        Processor

        Snapdragon® X Plus (10 Core)
        Snapdragon® X Elite (12 Core)
        Neural processing unit (NPU)

        Qualcomm® Hexagon™
        45 trillion operations per second
        Graphics

        Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU
        RAM

        Up to 64 GB
        Storage4

        Up to 1TB

        Surface Laptop, 13-inch

        Device

        Laptop
        Software

        <glyph>windows-logo-inline</glyph>Windows 11 Home
        Battery life

        Up to 23 hours of local video playback1
        Up to 16 hours of active web usage6
        Power supply

        Power supply unit included
        Display size

        13-inch PixelSense™ display5,7
        Ports

        2 X USB-C®/ USB 3.2 ports
        Camera & video

        1080p
        Network

        Wi-Fi 72 
        Weight3

        2.7 lbs (1.22 kg)
        Processor

        Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core)
        Neural processing unit (NPU)

        Qualcomm® Hexagon™ with 45 TOPS
        Graphics

        Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU
        RAM4

        16GB LPDDR5x RAM
        Storage4

        Up to 512GB (UFS)

        [1] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch 256GB, 16GB RAM 1st Edition devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
         

        [2] 6GHz band not available in all regions.

         

        [3] Might vary depending on manufacturing processes.

         

        [4] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1 GB = 1 billion bytes. 1 TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface Storage Options for more details.
         

        [5] Surface Laptop, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).

         

        [6] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch 1st Edition 256GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing twelve popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled.  Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.


        [7] Optimized for touch interaction only. Pen input and compatibility with Surface Pen, Surface Slim Pen, or similar accessories is not supported.

        Why buy from Microsoft?

         

        • Free shipping on every purchase, no catch

          2-3 day shipping at no cost, no minimum amount.​

        • Find a better price?

          If we drop the price of a physical product or you find it lower at an eligible retailer within 60 days, we'll give you a one-time price match.

        • Love it, or return it

          60-day free returns on physical products when you shop with Microsoft.

        • Get it now, pay later

          Flexible payment options help you pay how you want, at Microsoft Store.​

        Flexible payments

        Interest-free, bi-weekly payments

        Available for qualifying purchases of $30- $1,500.
        See terms at PayPal

        Spread payments up to 24 months

        Available for qualifying purchases of $49-$10,000.
        See terms at PayPal
        Discounts: Supplies limited. Actual savings depends on product availability.
        • Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
        • Price protection: Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new or refurbished consumer and commercial physical products made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes commercial and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. Both price adjustments: Price Adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support with your Microsoft Account information and any other information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment total per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers.

        • Trade-In: Available only through the Microsoft Store online in the United States. Offer valid for reimbursements after trade in of a qualifying device (PC, laptop, mobile phone, tablet, or video game console). To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for reimbursement. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. Cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

          This offer is operated by Teladvance, LLC and is not sponsored by Microsoft. Any appraised value will be determined at trade in and provided by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval.
        [1] Based on video playback test. Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.
        • *Accidental Damage refers to Accidental Damage from handling, meaning such damage resulting from unintentionally dropping the Covered Product, liquid spillage, or screen breakage. Mechanical Breakdown means the mechanical and/or electrical failure of the Covered Product that results in it no longer being able to perform its intended function, including defects in materials or workmanship and not normal use of the Product. See Terms and Conditions for more information.

        • **Offer valid with purchase of any new Surface Pro Copilot+ PC or Surface Laptop Copilot+ PC made between February 2nd, 2026 – June 30th, 2026 (the “Promotion Period”) after trade in of qualifying device where the customer submits the online trade-in claim for their used device, plus proof of purchase for new device during the Promotion Period, while supplies last. Available only in Microsoft Store online in the United States. Refurbished device purchases do not qualify for the offer. To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for reimbursement within 15 days of completing the online trade-in process. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. Trade in value depends on device type and condition after inspection by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval. See Microsoft Store Trade-in Program for steps and requirements. Not valid on prior orders or purchases; cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Void where prohibited or restricted by law. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time. Limit of 1 trade-in per qualifying Surface device purchase per customer.

           

          ^Available through 6/30/26, while supplies last. Offer valid for eligible college students with a valid .edu email who are new subscribers. Auto‑renew and other terms apply.
